  The dispatch removal and doc updates are clean and well-scoped to the commission. However, the agent made two significant out-of-scope changes: (1) modifying `scriptorium-core.ts` to integrate push into seal(), and (2) adding ~100 lines of new tests in `scriptorium-core.test.ts` — neither was requested by the commission. The scriptorium changes alter shared behavior (the seal API now pushes automatically) which affects all callers, and the doc updates to scriptorium.md reflect this behavioral change. The pnpm-lock.yaml diff also shows removal of an unrelated `dashboard` package section. Pattern coherence is adequate but the seal+push integration uses a duplicated try/catch pattern in two branches rather than extracting a helper, slightly inconsistent with the codebase's DRY tendencies.
